name: Very High
rationale: High consequence and high likelihood (raw cxl >= 15) — immediate inspection/intervention. Calibrate against TfNSW manual outcomes.
reviewSource: TfNSW Bridge Inspection Manual + 2026 portfolio review

name: High
rationale: Elevated on at least one axis (raw 9-14) — schedule intervention within the review cycle.
reviewSource: TfNSW Bridge Inspection Manual + 2026 portfolio review

name: Medium
rationale: Routine monitoring (raw 4-8) — address at next planned cycle.
reviewSource: TfNSW Bridge Inspection Manual + 2026 portfolio review

name: Low
reviewSource: TfNSW Bridge Inspection Manual + 2026 portfolio review
